evals.prompt: We get lots of first-time visitors who browse skincare then leave. I want personalized first-order offers and exit-intent popups. Walk through path monitoring, segments, matched coupons, and timing.
evals.expected_output: Four steps explicit; path table; segment-offer table; exit intent + backup triggers; modal copy.
expectations: Follows steps: browse path monitoring, preference classification, first-order offer match, popup timing including exit intent
Includes path or segment classification table or equivalent
Matches segments to distinct first-order offers or vouchers
Specifies exit intent as primary or co-primary trigger with at least one backup timing
Includes modal or push copy (headline/CTA) for first visit

evals.prompt: New visitors often view running shoes PDP twice then bounce. Margin allows 10% first order. What segment, offer, and exit-intent message?
evals.expected_output: Concrete segment, 10% offer, exit copy, trigger.
expectations: Identifies behavior preference from described path
First-order offer aligned to running shoes context

evals.prompt: Email our lapsed VIP list a win-back 20% code — draft only.
evals.expected_output: Win-back email; not full cold-start path workflow (should-not-trigger).
expectations: Does not replace VIP win-back with full new-visitor path monitoring tables as mandatory output
Cold-start skill depth optional at most one line
